visit_summary: Worth a trip if you confirm all pieces are included with the seller first.
alignment_summary: The listing photos show a workbench that appears to be in excellent condition, matching the seller's description of 'like new' and 'basically brand new'. The set in the photo also appears to be complete with all accessories visible.

reasons.text: Condition described as 'like new' and 'basically brand new'.
Kids never quite took to it, suggesting minimal use.
The workbench and all accessories appear to be in excellent condition with no visible damage.
The set appears to be complete with all accessories shown in the product image.

seller_questions: Is this the complete set? Anything missing?
Any damage, cleanliness, or safety issues before I drive?
When was it purchased? Original price or retail link?
